name: FatturaPA (IT) e-Invoicing
description: Italy FatturaPA / FatturaElettronica 1.2 (SdI) e-invoicing adapter, contributed into invoice:adapter — sandboxed. Builds the real schema-aligned XML, signs it host-side (XAdES, the SdI legally requires a signature), and — when a gateway is configured — POSTs it to the tenant's SdI intermediary.

settings.label: FatturaPA Gateway URL
settings.help: HTTP endpoint of your SdI intermediary that accepts the signed FatturaElettronica XML. Leave empty to skip transmission (returns noop).

settings.label: Transmitter Country (IdPaese)
settings.help: IdPaese of the IdTrasmittente. Defaults to the seller country code (IT).

settings.label: Transmitter Code (IdCodice)
settings.help: IdCodice of the IdTrasmittente — usually the seller's CF/VAT. Defaults to the seller VAT number.

settings.label: Codice Destinatario
settings.help: 7-char recipient code; '0000000' when delivery is via PEC. Defaults to '0000000'.

settings.label: PEC Destinatario
settings.help: Recipient PEC address, used when CodiceDestinatario is '0000000'.

settings.label: Regime Fiscale
settings.help: Tax regime code, e.g. 'RF01'. Defaults to 'RF01'.

secrets.label: Gateway Bearer Token
secrets.help: Optional bearer token for the SdI intermediary gateway; injected host-side, never seen by the plugin.
